sentence: וַיֹּאמֶר אֱלֹהִים תַּדְשֵׁא הָאָרֶץ דֶּשֶׁא עֵשֶׂב מַזְרִיעַ זֶרַע עֵץ פְּרִי עֹשֶׂה פְּרִי לְמִינוֹ אֲשֶׁר זַרְעוֹ־בוֹ עַל־הָאָרֶץ וַיְהִי־כֵן

grammatical-notes.עֵשֶׂב מַזְרִיעַ זֶרַע: Noun + Hiphil Participle + Noun. 'Herbs seeding seed'. Continuous reproductive function.
grammatical-notes.לְמִינוֹ: Preposition + Noun 'min' + Suffix 'o'. 'According to its biological kind'.
grammatical-notes.אֲשֶׁר זַרְעוֹ־בוֹ: Relative clause: 'which its seed is in it'.

dictionary-meaning.תַּדְשֵׁא: Sprout with young sprouting plants — disclosing the Hiphil causative and the repetitive 'root-noun' pairing (Rule 21).
dictionary-meaning.מַזְרִיעַ זֶרַע: Seed-producing herbs — disclosing the continuous Hiphil Participle of reproduction (Rule 9).
dictionary-meaning.לְמִינוֹ: According to their specific biological kinds — disclosing the classification 'min' as a marker of distinct created types (Rule 21).
dictionary-meaning.זַרְעוֹ־בוֹ: With their own seed within them — disclosing the self-perpetuating mechanism of the design (Rule 21).

main-translation: ***Then Elohim decreed***, '***Let the material foundation of the physical world sprout with young sprouting plants and seed-producing herbs, along with fruit-producing trees that yield fruit according to their specific biological kinds, with their own seed within them upon the ground***'; ***and it was established as a fixed and stable reality.***

main-translation-explanation.sprout with young sprouting plants: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Disclosed the 'Tadshe Deshe' wordplay which indicates the explosive, causative nature of the growth (Rule 21).
main-translation-explanation.seed-producing herbs: Disclosed the Hiphil participle showing the active reproductive capability (Rule 9).
main-translation-explanation.according to their specific biological k: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Challenged 'kinds' as too vague. REFINEMENT: Chose 'specific biological kinds' to disclose the categorical nature of 'min' (Rule 21).
main-translation-explanation.with their own seed within them: Disclosed the internal mechanism of perpetuation.

rejected-translations.phrase: Let the earth bring forth grass
rejected-translations.reason: Thin translation; fails to disclose the specific causative sprouting and the seeding mechanism.
